document.docTitle: Hevansia websteri Luangsa-ard, Hywel-Jones & Spatafora, IMA Fungus 8: 349 2017
document.masterDocTitle: Comprehensive treatise of Hevansia and three new genera Jenniferia, Parahevansia and Polystromomyces on spiders in Cordycipitaceae from Thailand

paragraph.taxonomicName: Hevansia websteri (Hywel-Jones) Luangsa-ard, Hywel-Jones & Spatafora, IMA Fungus 8: 349 (2017).

subSubSection.paragraph: Akanthomyces websteri ≡ Akanthomyces websteri Hywel-Jones, Mycol. Res. 100: 1068 (1996).
